usage.selection: Read this compact index first to shortlist report templates from metadata.
usage.previews: Read only the preview_md files for the shortlisted candidates.
usage.final_generation: Use the selected template's modules, visual language, and decision focus when generating or refining the final HTML report.
usage.never: Do not force a template if the user's request demands a custom report. Use the closest template as a starting point and adapt.

templates.name: Executive Command Center
templates.tagline: Dark executive control-room report for risk, backlog, delivery, and operational status.
templates.best_for: Leadership alignment, demand pools, incident/risk reviews, operational health checks.
templates.avoid_for: Warm customer-story reports or print-heavy finance memos.

templates.name: Boardroom KPI Brief
templates.tagline: Clean light report for concise management summaries and cross-department reviews.
templates.best_for: Monthly business reviews, executive memos, department syncs, budget and performance summaries.
templates.avoid_for: Highly visual ecommerce/customer reports that need more energy.

templates.name: Retail Growth Pulse
templates.tagline: Commercial growth report for orders, GMV, refunds, products, channels, and regions.
templates.best_for: Ecommerce operation reviews, campaign reviews, shop/platform sales reports.
templates.avoid_for: Strict compliance reports or technical backlog reports.

templates.name: Review Sentiment Board
templates.tagline: Customer feedback report focused on ratings, negative drivers, excerpts, and improvement actions.
templates.best_for: Product reviews, store reviews, satisfaction feedback, complaint analysis.
templates.avoid_for: Tables without text, rating, or issue fields.

templates.name: CRM Pipeline Radar
templates.tagline: Pipeline report for funnel leakage, stale opportunities, owners, and forecast risk.
templates.best_for: CRM lead/opportunity exports, sales pipeline reviews, forecast meetings.

templates.name: Inventory Risk Ledger
templates.tagline: Operational report for stockout, overstock, warehouse, supplier, and movement risks.
templates.best_for: Inventory snapshots, procurement exports, warehouse movement reports.
templates.avoid_for: Customer sentiment or creative market research.

templates.name: Expense Variance Memo
templates.tagline: Finance report for budget vs actual, expense mix, overdue payments, and exceptions.
templates.best_for: Expense reports, budget trackers, payment/reconciliation sheets.
templates.avoid_for: Customer-facing reports where finance precision is not central.

templates.name: HR Operations Brief
templates.tagline: People operations report for attendance, headcount, performance, and exception follow-up.
templates.best_for: HR monthly reviews, attendance checks, performance distribution summaries.
templates.avoid_for: Pure revenue, order, or inventory reports.

templates.name: Support SLA Control
templates.tagline: Service report for tickets, response time, aging, SLA breaches, and root causes.
templates.best_for: Customer service tickets, work orders, case exports, complaint handling.
templates.avoid_for: Datasets without status, owner, time, or issue type fields.

templates.name: Survey Insight Editorial
templates.tagline: Editorial report for survey distributions, segments, quotes, and insight-led recommendations.
templates.best_for: Questionnaire exports, offline research forms, qualitative + quantitative feedback.

templates.name: Generic Data Studio
templates.tagline: Exploratory profile report for unknown or mixed-schema tables.
templates.best_for: Any table where the business domain is unclear or the user asks for exploratory analysis.
templates.avoid_for: Final executive reports when a stronger domain-specific template clearly fits.

templates.name: Compliance Exception Register
templates.tagline: Exception-first report for audit, compliance, missing data, overdue items, and approval gaps.
templates.best_for: Tables where the core question is what is abnormal, overdue, missing, or non-compliant.

templates.name: Project Delivery Map
templates.tagline: Project portfolio report for status, milestones, owner load, delay risk, and next actions.
templates.best_for: Project trackers, milestone sheets, task exports, PMO reports.
templates.avoid_for: Retail order analysis or qualitative survey synthesis.

templates.name: Channel Mix Review
templates.tagline: Channel/region/category contribution report for sales, traffic, leads, or order tables.
templates.best_for: Tables with channel, region, source, shop, platform, or category fields.
templates.avoid_for: Datasets without a contribution metric such as amount, count, leads, or orders.

templates.name: Product Performance Matrix
templates.tagline: Product/SKU report for revenue, volume, refund, rating, inventory, or margin tradeoffs.
templates.best_for: Product catalogs, SKU orders, review/product issue tables, item performance exports.
templates.avoid_for: Tables with no product or item dimension.

templates.name: Finance Reconciliation Room
templates.tagline: Dark analytical finance report for reconciliation mismatches, unpaid items, and aging.
templates.best_for: Finance operations sheets where exceptions and aging are more important than presentation softness.
templates.avoid_for: Broad business reviews where finance is only one minor section.

templates.name: Procurement Supplier Watch
templates.tagline: Supplier report for purchase amounts, delivery risk, concentration, and exception follow-up.
templates.best_for: Purchase order exports, supplier scorecards, delivery and cost tracking sheets.

templates.name: Store Operations Scoreboard
templates.tagline: Store/branch report for operational KPIs, rankings, exceptions, and coaching actions.
templates.best_for: Store performance, branch operations, regional service or sales comparisons.
